drivers.notes: Decoupled Carbon Dome in Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top

description.en: Flagship stand-mount of the 700 S3 line, the only two-way to retain the Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top from the 800 Diamond family. A single 165 mm Continuum-cone driver pairs with a Decoupled Carbon Dome tweeter; a front-firing Flowport keeps placement near walls forgiving.
description.es: Bookshelf insignia de la línea 700 S3, el único de dos vías que conserva el Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top heredado de la 800 Diamond. Un driver Continuum de 165 mm trabaja junto al tweeter Carbon Dome desacoplado, con un Flowport frontal que permite ubicarlo cerca de la pared.
